message:
feat(cli,ui,export): add per-subcommand --json flags, structured export errors, and UI improvements

CLI --json flag expansion (lib.rs):
- Add --json flag (with --robot visible alias) to Stats, Diag, Status,
  State, Capabilities, ApiVersion, Introspect, View, Health, Doctor,
  Context, Expand, Sources::List/Doctor/Sync/Discover,
  Models::Status/Verify/CheckUpdate, and Mappings::List subcommands
- Each subcommand resolves structured format via resolve_subcommand_
  structured_format(cli, json), enabling per-subcommand JSON output
  without requiring the global --robot-format flag
- Rewrite open_franken_cli_read_db with three-tier fallback cascade:
  readonly storage -> raw readonly connection -> raw read-write connection,
  each with timeout retry
- Switch close_franken_cli_read_db from hard close() to close_in_place()
  with close_best_effort_in_place() fallback
- Add franken_query_row_map_retry and franken_query_map_collect_retry
  wrappers for per-query retry with backoff
- run_status now reports open_retryable state, treating temporarily-busy
  databases as "available" rather than "degraded"
- run_diag groups detected agent paths by public connector slug into
  connector_rows with retry-based fallback DB queries

HTML export structured errors (lib.rs):
- run_export_html detects structured output mode and emits JSON error
  objects (success, code, kind, message, hint, retryable) to stdout for
  every error path before returning CliError

Export snippets guard (pages/export.rs):
- ExportEngine checks table_exists("snippets") before querying snippet
  rows, returning empty vec when table is missing
- Add table_exists helper that validates table name and delegates to
  table_columns

UI improvements (ui/app.rs):
- Switch search debounce from ftui::Cmd::tick to delayed_tick() one-shot
  timer (Cmd::task that sleeps then emits CassMsg::Tick), preventing
  recurring tick overhead
- Add clear_search_surface_hit_regions() to zero out stale mouse hit-test
  areas when switching to Analytics/Sources surfaces
- Remove Alt+M keybinding for match-mode cycling (F9 remains)
- Fix suggestion click handler off-by-one (idx+1 -> idx)
- Extract editor_command_for_actions() and load_sources_config_for_actions()
  with test-only overrides via statics, replacing unsafe EnvVarGuard
  set_var/remove_var pattern

HTML export template (html_export/template.rs):
- Relax structured logging assertion to accept either component="template"
  or component="renderer" start events for parallel test isolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
